prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划:
2021–2025年山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约14902名、16662名、20108名、21199名、12753名。2021至2024年呈持续后移趋势，累计后移约6300名；2025年 大幅回升至12753名，较2024年提升约8446名，为近五年最高水平，显示该校在山东的报考热度显著回升；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021年185人、2022年18 7人、2023年192人、2024年201人、2025年203人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势；2026年计划189人，较2025年减少14人，缩招约6.9%，招生名额收紧将加剧竞争。
3 .【学校层次】南京航空航天大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第37名，近年排名稳定在35–37名区间，属顶尖211院校，综合实力接近中游985水平。
4 .【声誉热度】2025年高考周期声誉评价偏正面，投档线稳步提升，入选国家卓越工程师学院，保研率逐年提升至27%，学校吸引力持续增强；2026年周期声誉偏负面（涉及实验室 安全历史事件），但整体关注度有限。抖音热度总排名第61位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度中等。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 第五轮学科评估中，航空宇航科学与技术A-、力学A、机 械工程A、管理科学与工程A、控制科学与工程A-、信息与通信工程A-、软件工程A-，共7个学科获A-及以上评级，航空航天特色鲜明，工科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 航 空航天类、计算机类、电子信息类等核心专业社会热度持续升温；山东省2026年高考报名总人数约72万人，较2025年约68.1万人增加约5.7%，考生规模扩大使整体竞争加剧；南京航空航天大学位于江苏省南京市，属长三角核心区域，对山东考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在山东省招生规模较大（近年180– 200人级别），属省外重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅回升的强势走势、2026年招生计划缩招约6.9%带来的名额收紧、山东省考生总数增加约5.7%导致的竞 争加剧，以及学校声誉正面、优势学科突出的综合吸引力，预计2026年录取位次在2025年12753名基础上进一步上移（位次数字减小）。预测最低录取位次约12255名，区间11755– 12755名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 航空航天类（长空创新班）
- 计算机科学与技术（拔尖创新班）
- 电气工程及其自动化（拔尖创新班）
- 工程力学（钱伟长拔尖创新班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 人工智能
- 软件工程
- 微电子科学与工程（集成电路设计）
- 航空航天类
- 自动化
- 电子信息类
- 信息安全。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 机械工程
- 能源与动力工程
- 飞行器适航技术
- 应用统计学
- 大数据管理与应用
- 光电信息材料与器件。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间11755–12755名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底。位次优于区间下限（11755名以内）可重点冲击一档长空创新班、拔尖 创新班等王牌专业；位次在区间中段（约12000–12500名）应以航空航天类、自动化、电子信息类等核心工科为主；位次接近区间上限（12755名附近）建议优先考虑三档中学科评 估A级的机械工程、管理科学与工程相关专业，确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shandong Province comprehensive category were approximately 14902, 16662, 20108, 21199, and 12753 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, there was a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6300 places; in 2025, it rebounded significantly to 12753, an increase of about 8446 places compared to 2024, the highest level in the past five years, indicating a notable recovery in the popularity of this university in Shandong; the enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Shandong Province was 185 in 2021, 187 in 2022, 192 in 2023, 201 in 2024, and 203 in 2025, showing a gradual small-scale expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 189, a decrease of 14 from 2025, a reduction of about 6.9%, and the tightening of enrollment quotas will intensify competition.
3. [University Level] Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranked 37th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 35–37 range in recent years, belonging to top-tier 211 universities, with comprehensive strength close to the level of mid-tier 985 universities.
4. [Reputation and Popularity] During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was relatively positive, with steadily increasing admission scores, selection for the National Excellent Engineer Academy, and a year-on-year increase in the graduate recommendation rate to 27%, continuously enhancing the university's appeal; in the 2026 cycle, the reputation is relatively negative (involving historical laboratory safety incidents), but overall attention is limited. Douyin popularity ranks 61st overall, with an average evaluation, indicating moderate exposure on short video platforms.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology received A-, Mechanics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, Information and Communication Engineering A-, Software Engineering A-, with a total of 7 disciplines rated A- or above, featuring distinctive aerospace characteristics and outstanding engineering strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors such as Aerospace, Computer Science, and Electronic Information continue to see rising social popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Shandong Province college entrance examination is about 720,000, an increase of about 5.7% from approximately 681,000 in 2025, leading to intensified overall competition due to the larger candidate pool; Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, in the core area of the Yangtze River Delta, exerting strong regional appeal to Shandong candidates; the university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Shandong Province (around 180–200 in recent years), making it a key source province outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong upward trend of the 2025 ranking rebound, the tightening of enrollment quotas due to a reduction of about 6.9% in the 2026 plan, the intensified competition from an increase of about 5.7% in the total number of Shandong candidates, and the comprehensive appeal of the university's positive reputation and outstanding disciplines, it is expected that the 2026 admission ranking will further move up (smaller ranking number) from the 2025 ranking of 12753. The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 12255, with a range of 11755–12755.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Aerospace (Chang Kong Innovation Class)
- Computer Science and Technology (Top-notch Innovation Class)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation (Top-notch Innovation Class)
- Engineering Mechanics (Qian Weichang Top-notch Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Software Engineering
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering (Integrated Circuit Design)
- Aerospace
- Automation
- Electronic Information
- Information Security.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mechanical Engineering
- Energy and Power Engineering
- Aircraft Airworthiness Technology
- Applied Statistics
- Big Data Management and Application
- Optoelectronic Information Materials and Devices.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 11755–12755, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. Candidates with rankings better than the lower limit (within 11755) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors such as the Chang Kong Innovation Class and Top-notch Innovation Class; those with rankings in the middle of the range (approximately 12000–12500) should prioritize core engineering majors like Aerospace, Automation, and Electronic Information; those with rankings near the upper limit (around 12755) are advised to consider Tier 3 majors related to Mechanical Engineering and Management Science and Engineering, which are rated A-level in discipline evaluations, to ensure admission.
